old_claim.note: Merchant Partnership Contracts provides a capability that enables this technology without being the only possible path.

new_claim_absent: No direct dependency remains from shipyard_drydocks to merchant_partnership_contracts; Classical ship sheds and haul-out maintenance infrastructure require naval shipbuilding and harbor infrastructure, not a specific merchant partnership contract form.

source_shape.source_locator: Archaeology Magazine reports Piraeus ship sheds associated with Classical Athenian naval bases and trireme storage, supporting a shipshed and haul-out maintenance scope.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: The source supports shipyard drydocks through Classical naval-base shipsheds and trireme storage rather than merchant partnership contracting.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: Because the source ties the node to naval shipshed infrastructure, the merchant partnership contract node is unrelated commercial content rather than a prerequisite capability.

ontology_before: Shipyard Drydocks depended on Merchant Partnership Contracts, mixing commercial-legal contract forms into naval-base haul-out and maintenance infrastructure.
ontology_after: Shipyard Drydocks remains scoped to shipsheds, shipbuilding, and harbor infrastructure without a direct merchant partnership contract dependency.
invariant_preserved_or_changed: Changed: shipyard_drydocks no longer depends on merchant_partnership_contracts. Preserved: shipbuilding and harbor engineering still carry the technical infrastructure dependencies.
would_reject_if: The shipyard_drydocks node is rescoped to privately financed merchant shipyards where partnership contracts are a source-backed direct prerequisite.
A source shows Classical Piraeus shipsheds depended specifically on merchant partnership contracts rather than naval and harbor infrastructure.
Removing the edge leaves shipyard_drydocks without any shipbuilding or harbor prerequisite.
short_reason: Merchant partnership contracts are not prerequisite infrastructure for Classical naval shipsheds.
